data.description: The shift of a Bitcoin mining firm towards AI infrastructure hosting resulted in the generation of its initial data center revenue, with AMD also increasing its capacity during this period.

data.title: Seneca Capital Partners Announces $120,000,000 Portfolio Disposition of Seneca Capital Income Real Estate Fund II, L.P.
data.description: A Denver private equity firm, Seneca Capital Partners, has successfully sold off all real estate assets held by Seneca Capital Income Real Estate Fund II, L.P. The sale amounted to around $120 million in total transaction value. The SCIRE Fund II was specifically designed to procure and manage a wide range of income-generating real estate assets, prioritizing long-lasting profitability.
Mark R Warner's latest stock trades reveal additions of IWD, IWF, TOST, ACN, WFC, and 40 others.

data.title: AutoNation Says Deferred Car Buying Is Feeding Its After-Sales Boom
data.description: AutoNation, Inc. saw its shares rise on Friday following the release of its first-quarter 2026 financial results. The company's performance in higher-margin segments helped counterbalance weaker sales, with a focus on financing and after-sales operations as support. The first quarter saw AutoNation achieve adjusted earnings per share of $4.69, surpassing analysts' expectations of $4.51. However, revenue for the quarter came in at $6.552 billion, a 2% decrease from the previous year and falling short of the projected $6.651 billion. Gross profit also experienced a 1% decline to $1.21 billion, while operating income dropped 6% to $314.3 million. Same-store revenue saw a 4% decrease to $6.40 billion, and same-store gross profit fell 2% to $1.18 billion. Despite the challenges faced, the company expressed satisfaction with its strong performance in the first quarter. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

Iran’s Foreign Minister Araghchi: Iran's armed forces remain fully vigilant.

data.title: 2,500 Professionals to Explore Future of Family Support at International Conference in Portland
data.description: St. Louis, May 1, 2026 - The 2026 Parents as Teachers International Conference (PATCON26) is set to take place, showcasing innovation in home visiting. This annual event features a keynote address from Will Maurer, a renowned children's media expert and TEDx speaker. Attendees can expect to gain valuable insights and knowledge in the field. The event promises to be an enriching experience, highlighting the importance of home visiting in promoting child development and well-being. Stay tuned for updates on this exciting gathering.

data.title: Invesco Closed-End Funds Declare Dividends
data.description: On May 1, 2026, the Board of Trustees for various Invesco closed-end funds announced dividends. Invesco Senior Income Trust (NYSE: VVR) modified its distribution rate to align with current market circumstances, marking the first change since January.

data.title: TITAN INTERNATIONAL, INC. TO PARTICIPATE IN OPPENHEIMER INDUSTRIAL GROWTH CONFERENCE
data.description: In West Chicago, Illinois, on May 1, 2026, Titan International, Inc. (NYSE: TWI) revealed that the Company, a top player in the off-highway wheels, tires, assemblies, and undercarriage products sector, will have its management involved in the forthcoming event.

data.title: General Surgery Claims: May Malpractice Risk Review--Insights to Reduce Patient Harm and Malpractice Exposure
data.description: In NAPA, California on May 1, 2026, The Doctors Company, the largest physician-owned medical malpractice insurer in the country, published "General Surgery Claims: May Malpractice Risk Review". This monthly series focuses on analyzing different specialties to assist in managing risks.

data.title: AI Is Accelerating -- But Who Decides Its Direction?
data.description: XPRIZE CEO Anousheh Ansari has recently teamed up with Planet Classroom to present a challenge to startup leaders, urging them to focus on creating real impact rather than generating hype. This collaboration comes amid the rapid transformation of markets by artificial intelligence, raising concerns among founders, investors, and policymakers regarding the direction of innovation. The initiative is set to inspire entrepreneurs to consider the long-term effects of their ventures, emphasizing the importance of building sustainable solutions. The announcement was made in New York on May 1, 2026, sending a clear message to the industry that success should be measured not just in profits but also in the positive changes made to society.
